# Render the Next Era of Creation with the BytePlus AI Stack — Agentic AI Build Week Workshop

[GenAI Fund - Official](https://luma.com/gaf?k=c)

Jul

8

Wednesday, July 8

10:00 AM - 12:00 PM GMT+7

Register to See Address

Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

Welcome! Please choose your desired ticket type:

Request to Join

You will be asked to verify token ownership with your wallet.

About Event

The AI stack you ship on is about to change. **BytePlus** — ByteDance's enterprise AI arm — is opening the hood on the tools their own teams use to build at scale, live in Ho Chi Minh City as part of Agentic AI Build Week.

This is hands-on and builder-first. Come build, not just watch.

 **What you'll take away**

- A working view of the BytePlus AI stack — from idea to shipped AI product, faster

- Practical patterns you can put to work the same week during the hackathon

- For qualifying startups: a path into the **V-START Global Accelerator** (up to **$15,000** in AI & cloud credits)

 **Your speakers**

- **Vu Tien Hung** — Senior Manager, Enterprise Sector, BytePlus

- **Lam Thao** — Solution Architect, BytePlus

- **Tran Quoc Huy** — Enterprise Sales Manager, BytePlus

 **Event details**

- 📅 Tuesday, July 8, 2026

- 🕐 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM (Indochina Time, GMT+7)

- 📍 TBC, HCMC

- 🎟 Part of Agentic AI Build Week (July 8–12, 2026)

- ✅ Private event · approval required · limited seats

 **Before you apply:** You must be registered for Agentic AI Build Week — [👉 Register for Agentic AI Build Week](https://luma.com/gaf-hm61) if you haven't yet. Seats are prioritised for Builder & Founding Builder ticket holders, so don't forget to [🚀 Sign up for the AABW Buildathon on Devpost](https://agentic-ai-build-week-2026.devpost.com/?utm_source=luma).

 **👉 Apply now to request your seat. Approval required, and seats are filling fast.**

Location

Please register to see the exact location of this event.

Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

[View on Google Maps](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=10.824298548535092%2C106.62998121126604)
